repositoryProfile.stack: RuoYi + Vue3 + Codex Auto Dev OS

summary: R-09 creates configurable modeling contracts only. Product, material, sales option, field, formula, rule, and technical decomposition concepts must be configuration/version/snapshot driven before sales-order runtime starts.

mustReadFiles.reason: Allowed and forbidden scope for R-09.
Future test mapping for R-10 through R-16.

mustNotBreak: Do not implement sales-order in R-09.
Do not implement process/material/formula/drawing runtime in R-09.
Do not create SQL migrations in R-09.
Do not modify customer runtime or idempotency runtime in R-09.
Do not modify security config, package.json, or tools in R-09.
nextStep: After R-09 acceptance and local verification, continue to R-10 product/material/sales-option master data MVP.
